title: Herobrine Model
description: A resource pack dependency for the Herobrine data pack.
body:
## If you are using version v6.0 or later of the data pack, you do no longer need this resource pack!

This resource pack is a dependency for my Herobrine data pack **(v5.4 or lower)**. It must be used in order for Herobrine to appear in your world. For more information, check out the video.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kVWBEm6riaQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
